overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist riding a horse along a scenic lakeshore. The scene features a snow-capped mountain backdrop, castle ruins across the water, and a wooden dock structure, with the character traversing sandy beach terrain in bright daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy lakeshore with wooden dock and distant castle

events.description: wooden dock exits the frame left as the horse continues along the shoreline

agents.ego_description: riding a horse along the water's edge, moving away from the wooden dock structure

entered.detail: weathered wooden pier extending into the clear lake water
large mountain with snow-covered peak dominating the background
ruined stone tower and castle walls visible across the lake
clear turquoise water with visible underwater details
sandy beach terrain along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of a character on horseback standing near a wooden dock on a sandy lakeshore. A majestic snow-capped mountain and castle ruins are visible across the water. The character begins riding along the beach, and the wooden dock exits the frame as the horse moves forward along the shoreline.

events.description: wooden dock re-enters the frame from the right as the horse continues along the curved shore
stone village buildings with red tiled roofs become visible on the right shoreline

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride along the shoreline, approaching the dock and village area from a new angle

entered.detail: wooden dock structure reappearing as the character rounds the shoreline
cluster of stone buildings with red roofs indicating a small settlement

segments.scene_description: The character continues riding along the open shoreline with the dock no longer visible. As the horse follows the curved beach, the wooden dock re-enters the frame from the right, now approached from a different angle. Village buildings with distinctive red roofs appear on the right shore, while the snow-capped mountain shifts to the left side of the frame as the camera perspective changes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sandy lakeshore that shifts from a wide vista of distant ruins to a closer approach of a coastal village. It begins with a character on horseback standing near a wooden dock, with a majestic snow-capped mountain and castle ruins framing the horizon across the water. As the horse moves forward along the shoreline, the dock exits the frame and the perspective opens up to the expansive beach. The scene then shifts as the horse follows the curve of the coast, causing the snow-capped mountain to drift toward the left of the frame. Finally, the camera angle pivots to bring the wooden dock back into view from the right, revealing village buildings with distinctive red roofs along the shore.
